name: Stuffed Bell Pepper with Corn Bread Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 Dozen medium bell peppers (plus 4 to cut for seasoning)
Salt -- Cayenne pepper and sugar to taste
1 Small Box corn bread mix (4 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the corn bread mix by adding 4 teaspoons of sugar; bake and let cool.
2. Cut the bell peppers in half; wash and clean them.
3. Sauté the ground beef, onions, garlic, and bell peppers until done.
4. Add shrimp, parsley (chopped), shallots, salt, and cayenne pepper to the sautéed mixture.
5. Crumble cornbread into the pan, add the ground beef mixture; mix together.
6. Stuff the bell peppers with the mixture.
7. Steam for 15 minutes before serving.
This dressing can also be used for stuffing chicken breast, and the shrimp may be omitted and oysters substituted when preparing dressing for chicken or turkey.
